title: F-Tech: Core
description: "F-Tech: Core" is a core library for mods of the "F-Tech" (Future Tech) series.
body:
"F-Tech: Core" is a core library for mods of the "F-Tech" (Future Tech) series.
 

The collection of mods adds new ways to automate various aspects of the game. Including Mining, item transport, building, material processing, defence, and power generation.

 

This library adds the common code used across these mods.


Mods using this lib:
- [F-Tech: Robots](https://modrinth.com/mod/f-tech-robots)
- [F-Tech: Equipment](https://modrinth.com/mod/f-tech-equipment)
